misc_summary: Front matter containing advertisements and business listings including: wall paper and paint ads (Heber J. Grant & Co.), mortgage investment services (Ashton-Jenkins Company), washing machine ads (Maytag), travel fares (Southern Pacific Lines), gasoline ads (Utah Oil Refining Company), University of Utah Summer School information, L.D.S. garment advertisements from multiple vendors (Utah Woolen Mills, Barton & Co., Cutler's Garments), seed company ads (Vogeler's), laundry services (Troy Laundry), business college ads (L.D.S. Business College), and various other commercial advertisements typical of magazine front/back matter from 1930.
